Qifrey's curse has some rather... peculiar seasonal effects. Springtime, when many species of trees begin to pollinate, the witch professor finds himself aching for a more human equivalent.

Simply put, he's in heat.

[ I saw someone mention this concept in a wha server and it gripped me,,, anyway,,,,, I want that twink impregnated on my desk by noon sharp ]
